---
title: "Part 1"
format: html
---

### Data Description

My data source is field data collected by Dr. Alison Haupt's capstone class for 2026 and 2023.

The variables of my data include sites, year, black abalone counts, crevice sizes, and black abalone found in crevices.

How has habitat availibilty affected abalone populations across the Monterey Bay between 2023 and 2026?

### Data Visualization

Final visualizations will include box-plots showing the frequencies of abalones at different sites.

### Data Cleaning

1.  Do you need to reformat any variables into different types (e.g. factors, time, dates, strings)? Or remove information from variable values?

    -   Yes

2.  Do you need to deal with any missing data, especially missing data coded other than NA?

    -   Yes

3.  Do you need to filter your data?

    -   Yes
